Package com.transportapp.generator

Class TransportDataGenerator

java.lang.Object
com.transportapp.generator.TransportDataGenerator
public class TransportDataGenerator extends Object
A class responsible for generating transport data including the map of cities, transport stations, and departures.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TransportDataGenerator(int X, int Y)
    Constructs a TransportDataGenerator for a country map of size X by Y.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String[][]
    generateCountryMap()
    Generates a 2D array representing the map of the country.
    TransportData
    generateData()
    Generates a complete set of transport data including the country map, list of stations, and list of departures.
    Departure
    generateDeparture(String type, String from, int x, int y)
    Generates a random departure for the specified transport type and origin city.
    List<Departure>
    generateDepartures(List<Station> stations)
    Generates a list of departures (bus and train trips) for each station.
    List<Station>
    generateStations()
    Generates transport stations (both bus and train) for each city on the map.
    List<String>
    getNeighbors(int x, int y)
    Returns a list of neighboring cities (up, down, left, right) for the given city coordinates.
    void
    saveToJson(TransportData data, String filename)
    Saves the entire transport data (map, stations, departures) to a JSON file.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • TransportDataGenerator

      public TransportDataGenerator(int X, int Y)
      Constructs a TransportDataGenerator for a country map of size X by Y.
      Parameters:
      X - the number of columns (width of the map)
      Y - the number of rows (height of the map)

  • Method Details

    • generateData

      public TransportData generateData()
      Generates a complete set of transport data including the country map, list of stations, and list of departures.
      Returns:
      a TransportData object containing the generated data

    • generateCountryMap

      public String[][] generateCountryMap()
      Generates a 2D array representing the map of the country. Each city is labeled with a unique ID in the format "G_X_Y".
      Returns:
      a 2D String array representing the country map

    • generateStations

      public List<Station> generateStations()
      Generates transport stations (both bus and train) for each city on the map. Bus stations are labeled with prefix "A_", and train stations with "Z_".
      Returns:
      a list of Station objects representing all stations

    • generateDepartures

      public List<Departure> generateDepartures(List<Station> stations)
      Generates a list of departures (bus and train trips) for each station. Departure times, durations, and prices are randomly generated.
      Parameters:
      stations - the list of all stations for which to generate departures
      Returns:
      a list of Departure objects representing all scheduled trips

    • generateDeparture

      public Departure generateDeparture(String type, String from, int x, int y)
      Generates a random departure for the specified transport type and origin city.
      Parameters:
      type - the type of transport ("bus" or "train")
      from - the origin station identifier (e.g., "A_2_3" or "Z_1_0")
      x - the x-coordinate of the city
      y - the y-coordinate of the city
      Returns:
      a randomly generated Departure object

    • getNeighbors

      public List<String> getNeighbors(int x, int y)
      Returns a list of neighboring cities (up, down, left, right) for the given city coordinates.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the current city
      y - the y-coordinate of the current city
      Returns:
      a list of neighboring city names (e.g., "G_1_2")

    • saveToJson

      public void saveToJson(TransportData data, String filename)
      Saves the entire transport data (map, stations, departures) to a JSON file.
      Parameters:
      data - the transport data to be serialized
      filename - the name of the output JSON file
